data.content: Implementation review approved. All 8 acceptance criteria verified: (1) timestamp persisted in upgrade-check.json under global data dir, (2) 24h interval check with first-run support, (3) single-line stderr banner with current/available versions, (4) no banner on up-to-date or network failure, (5) timestamp updated after every attempt regardless of outcome, (6) 2-second curl timeout, (7) comprehensive unit tests (first-run, stale, fresh, newer, current, network failure) plus CLI integration tests with stub curl, (8) no new external dependencies. Shared helpers cleanly extracted from doctor.rs into release_version.rs. KNOTS_SKIP_DOCTOR_UPGRADE escape hatch preserved. make sanity passes at 95.05% coverage. File sizes within 500-line limit.
